title: Build stage caching
body:
Is it possible to take advantage of caching layers from previous steps so they don't need to re-run?

For example, I would expect this to produce the same image but at the moment it rebuilds from scratch.

```
buildah bud .
buildah bud -t myimage .
```

comments.body: We have a long range plan to allow users to specify if they want caching or not.  For the developer use case it would be a big benefit, but for the situation where you are putting buildah into an build chain, it is actually slower, and you end up with lots of layers.
We are always looking for people to help, so if someone wanted to take a stab at this...
I think we have a dup of this.  @umohnani8 Close one of them.
https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/601 is a duplicate, closing this one.
